mano_cua.result_summary: petStore页面加载正常但Status字段为空，Swagger PetStore后端API返回503 Service Unavailable，useEndpointData报错，transform函数从未执行，页面无错误提示只显示空Status
mano_cua.last_reasoning: petStore page loads but Status field is empty. SSR payload shows 503 error from /api/__api_party/petStore endpoint. Swagger PetStore backend unavailable, transform function never executes.
